prediction.reasoning: CVX prediction based on historical volatility analysis showing annualized volatility around 28-32%. Applied 21-day time horizon with expected slight upward drift due to energy sector fundamentals and dividend yield attractiveness. Confidence intervals calculated using normal distribution assumption with volatility-adjusted standard deviations. Oil price stability and seasonal demand patterns support modest positive bias in point estimate.
